scripts.gen:ts: cd packages/schemas/src && ../../engine/node_modules/.bin/json2ts -i action-envelope.schema.json -o ../../engine/src/generated/action-envelope.ts && ../../engine/node_modules/.bin/json2ts -i action-receipt.schema.json -o ../../engine/src/generated/action-receipt.ts && ../../engine/node_modules/.bin/json2ts -i policy.schema.json -o ../../engine/src/generated/policy.ts && ../../sdk-ts/node_modules/.bin/json2ts -i action-envelope.schema.json -o ../../sdk-ts/src/generated/action-envelope.ts && ../../sdk-ts/node_modules/.bin/json2ts -i action-receipt.schema.json -o ../../sdk-ts/src/generated/action-receipt.ts && ../../sdk-ts/node_modules/.bin/json2ts -i policy.schema.json -o ../../sdk-ts/src/generated/policy.ts
scripts.gen:py: cd packages/sdk-py && ( [ -x .venv/bin/python ] && .venv/bin/python -m authensor.codegen || (command -v uv >/dev/null && uv run --extra dev python -m authensor.codegen) || python -m authensor.codegen ) || echo 'Python codegen skipped (optional)'
scripts.gen: npm run gen:ts --ignore-scripts && (npm run gen:py --ignore-scripts || true)
scripts.gen:check: npm run gen --ignore-scripts && (git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && git diff --exit-code packages/*/src/generated packages/sdk-py/authensor/generated || echo 'Not in git repo, skipping diff check')
